channel.title: MiniClarc
channel.description: MiniClarc — Hard fork of Clarc maintained by dttxorg. See https://github.com/dttxorg/MiniClarc/releases for binary downloads.

item.title: MiniClarc v2.0.0
item.description:
MiniClarc 2.0.0 — first independent release of the hard-forked distribution.
Changes from upstream v1.3.x: - Project identity: bundle id com.idealapp.Clarc -> com.dttxorg.MiniClarc, app name -> "MiniClarc", independent version line (v2.x). - Full Access permission mode (--permission-mode bypassPermissions + --allowedTools "*"). - Phase-based auto-collapse for completed thinking / tool_use / tool_result. - Configurable fold threshold (8 / 15 / 30 / Off). - Focus Mode no longer freezes the chat view. - PermissionModal countdown and permission settings localized (en / zh-Hans / ko).
This build is ad-hoc signed and not notarized. Right-click the app -> Open on first launch to clear Gatekeeper.
